aboutSection.title: Association of National Economic Cooperation of Uzbekistan
aboutSection.description: Founded in May 2025, the Association operates as a platform for strengthening economic cooperation, attracting investment, supporting entrepreneurship, and expanding Uzbekistan's international economic partnerships.
aboutSection.missionText: Expanding national export potential and developing international cooperation
aboutSection.activityText: Attracting investments, strengthening trade relations and supporting entrepreneurs

contactSection.title: Get in Touch
contactSection.description: Have questions? Want to get more information? Contact us and we will respond shortly.
